title: Parley Charts Catalog v1
description: Parley's first-party charts catalog: every component and function of the official A2UI Basic Catalog v0.9.1, plus two leaf components for lightweight data visualization — Chart (line/bar/area series over data-model rows, with optional point/range selection written back through two-way binding) and Stat (a labeled headline number with an optional delta). The catalog ID above is an opaque, versioned identifier agreed out-of-band; hosts never fetch it at runtime. Adding Chart and Stat as leaf components keeps every Basic Catalog resource valid under this catalog unchanged.

allOf.description: A cartesian chart (line, bar, or area) plotting one or more numeric series from an array of records in the data model. Colors come from the host theme's chart tokens, so charts always match the host's visual language.

title.description: An optional title rendered above the chart.

data.description: A binding to an array of records in the data model (e.g. {"path": "/report/monthly"}). Each record supplies one x-axis category plus the numeric values named by 'series'.

x.description: Which record field provides the x-axis category.

key.description: The record field holding the x-axis value (e.g. 'month').

label.description: A human-readable label for the x axis, used for accessibility.

series.description: The numeric series to plot, one per record field.

key.description: The record field holding this series' numeric value. Restricted to a safe identifier shape because hosts derive CSS custom property names from it.

label.description: A human-readable name for the series, shown in tooltips and the legend. Defaults to the key.

color.description: The host theme color token for this series. Raw color values are deliberately not supported; omitting the color assigns tokens in order.

stacked.description: If true, bar and area series stack instead of overlapping.

height.description: The chart height in CSS pixels. Hosts clamp the value to this range.

selection.description: Two-way binding for user selection. In 'point' mode, clicking a data point writes {mode, index, x, values} at 'path'; in 'range' mode, dragging across the plot writes {mode, startIndex, endIndex, from, to}. The written value lives in the surface's local data model — reference it from action contexts to send it to the agent.

path.description: The JSON Pointer at which the selection value is written.

allOf.description: A labeled headline number (a KPI tile), optionally with a relative-change delta. Typically laid out in a Row alongside sibling Stats.

value.description: The headline value, usually a data-model binding to a number. Non-numeric values render as plain text.

format.description: How to format a numeric value. 'percent' treats the value as a fraction (0.18 renders as 18%).

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code used when format is 'currency'.

delta.description: Optional relative change expressed as a fraction (0.12 renders as +12%). Non-negative deltas render as positive/upward, negative as downward.

anyFunction.description: This catalog inherits every Basic Catalog v0.9.1 function unchanged.
